hero_title_accent: For Hong Kong Digital Asset Exchanges
hero_subtitle: SFTY supports Hong Kong exchanges by connecting provider outputs into structured workflows that manage VASP compliance, regulatory rules, Travel Rule operations and audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions

trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_title: Compliance workflows slow without jurisdiction focus
problem_description: Exchanges operating in Hong Kong face operational friction as local VASP compliance requirements remain fragmented across multiple tools and providers. This creates gaps in audit readiness, regulatory reporting and consistent application of jurisdiction-specific rules.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes Hong Kong-specific rules, provider outputs, case management and reporting workflows into a unified compliance layer that streamlines audits and enforces consistent regulatory application.
workflow_title: From regulatory change to internal rules
workflow_description: SFTY monitors Hong Kong regulatory updates and maps them to internal compliance rules that guide onboarding, review, case management, and audit evidence workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Hong Kong exchanges?
faq_1_answer: SFTY supports Hong Kong exchanges by connecting provider outputs into jurisdiction-specific onboarding, ongoing monitoring, case workflows and regulatory rule updates tailored for VASP compliance requirements.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage Hong Kong Travel Rule workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures Hong Kong Travel Rule message routing, status tracking, exception handling and case creation to support workflows fit local regulatory expectations and compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and evidence packages in audit-ready formats to support internal review and regulatory inspection preparedness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule providers, orchestrating their outputs into a connected compliance workflow layer without replacing current tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into controlled workflows, decisions, evidence and reports suited for Hong Kong regulatory standards.
final_title: Structure Hong Kong VASP compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs into audit-ready cases, Travel Rule events and jurisdiction-specific compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
